dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used ADX_14 > 25 as trend confirmation signal (longer-term trend indicator). Used stoch_k for short-term overbought (>80) and oversold (<20) conditions. Entry triggers on first stochastic extreme after trend confirmation. Exit on stochastic mean reversion (crossing 50 level). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both long (overbought entry) and short (oversold entry) trades based on trend direction.

backtest_rule.reason: Used ADX_14 > 25 as trend confirmation signal (longer-term trend indicator). Used stoch_k for short-term overbought (>80) and oversold (<20) conditions. Entry triggers on first stochastic extreme after trend confirmation. Exit on stochastic mean reversion (crossing 50 level). Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both long (overbought entry) and short (oversold entry) trades based on trend direction.

source_rule_text: Use a short-term stochastic oscillator to time entry into a longer-term trend trade, entering only on the first overbought or oversold condition after a new trend signal is generated.
